name: Triple-Layer Cookie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the first six ingredients. Cut in butter until crumbly.
2. Add egg; mix well. Spread in a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes.
4. Sprinkle coconut on top. Drizzle sweetened condensed milk evenly over coconut.
5. Return to the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. In a saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips and peanut butter, stirring until smooth.
7. Spread mixture on bars.
8. Cool. Yield: 2-3 dozen.
